nodes.question: Who is the LIM (Launch Innovation Manager) on the project?
What country will this product be sold in United States, Canada, Latin America, Europe, “Asia-Pacific, Middle East, Africa” (AMEA), or UNSURE?
Are you creating a new Case, Display, WIP (Work in Process), or UNSURE?”
Is this a Shipper or Mod display type?
Is this MOD a full, half, or quarter?
Is this MOD made with full cases or trays?
Will this be sold at club stores, traditional retailers, an e-commerce retailer, or RX DTC (Direct to Consumer)?
Will this item need a new Club Package UPC or use an existing Club Package UPC?
Will the customer be required to order the item as a full unit load, or can it be purchased at the case level?
Is this a straight case, a bulk case, or a single serve tray?
Will this item need a new Package UPC or use an existing Package UPC?
Does the item have pouches?
Does the package inside the case have a printed UPC?
Will this item need a new Package UPC or use an existing Package UPC?
Will this item need a new Package UPC or use an existing Package UPC?
Will the items be packed into a Brown Corrugate Box or Printed Box?
(no question)
Is this a Case or Tote/Kone of product?
Will this be sold at club stores or traditional retailers?
Is this item built by VAS?
Is this a straight case, or a bulk case?
Will this item need a new Package UPC or use an existing Package UPC?
Does the item have pouches?
Is this a Pringles product?
Is this an RX Product?
What type of Project: PDR, PWR, SCR, KUBIC?
Enter a numeric Project Number (only numbers and dash allowed)
Enter Project Name (only letters, numbers, and dash allowed)
Select the category.
Enter a brief product description (max 40 chars)
Enter a brief project overview and technical notes
What stated weight will this be applicable for: PACKAGE or INNER ITEM/POUCH?
What is the status of the stated weight: ESTIMATED or FINALIZED?
What is the stated net weight?
What is the unit of measure of the stated net weight: OZ, LB, G, KG?
What is the status of the case count: ESTIMATED or FINALIZED?
What is the case count?
What is a SKU number that can be a reference material for this new product? (only required for KUBIC Project Type)
Is this product approved to sell via Ecommerce?
Is this product designated to one customer?
Select the customer's name
Should the customer's name be included in the material description?
Is the product a variety pack?
Will the variety pack components have UPC codes?
Is this item owned by Away From Home?
Is this an Export Product?
Build the item using existing Export UPCs?
List the existing Export UPC codes
Will the product have a private label?
What is the private label name associated to the product?
Build the item using existing Private Label UPCs?
List the existing Private Label UPC codes
Should the product's information be sent through GDSN to the customer (DATASYNC)?
Is this product a NON Sellable FERT (FALB)?
What is the Material Prefix Description?
Is a compressed UPC required for any of the components: NO, POUCH, PACKAGE, BOTH?
What is the existing Package UPC Code?
What is the existing Package K Number?
What is the existing Pouch UPC Code?
What is the existing Pouch K Number?
List the UPC codes if already assigned
Indicate if the existing Pouch or Package (or both) are compressed: NO, POUCH, PACKAGE, BOTH
Might Sale Samples be needed?
List any existing Knumbers that will be used
Select all special packaging requirements needed for launch.
If unsure what to select, please reach out to the Supply Chain Data Governance team at scdatagov@kellanova.com.  Step-by-Step process has ended.

edges.raw: Capture "LIM" (1006). Go to BUSN_AREA_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
"Business Area" (1305) is <'KELLANOVA'>. Go to PROD_COUNTRY_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If 'Latin America' or 'LA' or 'Mexico' or 'MX' is selected then "Product Country" (1008) is <'LA - Latin America'>.  Go to NOT_CA_FORM_TYPE_Q.
If 'Europe' or 'EU' is selected then "Product Country" (1008) is <'EU - Europe'>.  Go to NOT_CA_FORM_TYPE_Q.
If 'Asia-Pacific' or 'Middle East' or ' Africa' or 'AMEA' is selected then "Product Country" (1008) is <'AMEA - Asia-Pacific, Middle East, Africa'>.  Go to NOT_CA_FORM_TYPE_Q.
If 'United States' or 'US' is selected then "Product Country" (1008) is <'US - United States'>.  Go to NOT_CA_FORM_TYPE_Q.
If 'Canada' or 'CA' is selected then "Product Country" (1008) is <'CA - Canada'> and "Form Type" (1007) is <'CASE'>. Go to CA_Q.
If 'UNSURE' is selected then Go to UNSURE_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If 'DISPLAY' is selected then "Form Type" (1007) is <'DISPLAY'>.  Go to DISPLAY_Q.
If 'CASE' is selected then "Form Type" (1007) is <'CASE'>. Go to CASE_Q.
If 'WIP' is selected then "Form Type" (1007) is <'WIP'>. Go to WIP_Q.
If 'UNSURE' is selected then Go to UNSURE_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If 'SHIPPER' is selected then "Product Type" (1009) is <'SHIPPER'> and "product subtype" (1010) is <'<NOT REQUIRED>'>. Go to END_COUNTRY_Q.
If 'MOD' is selected then Go to MOD_TYPE_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If 'QUARTER' is selected then "Product Type" (1009) is <'Qtr Mod'> and "product subtype" (1010) is <'<NOT REQUIRED>'>.  Go to END_COUNTRY_Q.
If 'HALF' is selected then "Product Type" (1009) is <'Half Mod'> and "product subtype" (1010) is <'<NOT REQUIRED>'>. Go to END_COUNTRY_Q.
If 'FULL' is selected then Go to FULL_MOD_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If 'full cases' is selected then "Product Type" (1009) is <'Rainbow Mod'> and "product subtype" (1010) is <'<NOT REQUIRED>'>.  Go to END_COUNTRY_Q.
If 'trays' is selected then "Product Type" (1009) is <'Full Mod'> and "product subtype" (1010) is <'<NOT REQUIRED>'>. Go to END_COUNTRY_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If 'CLUB' is selected then Go to CLUB_Q.
If 'TRADITIONAL' is selected. Go to TRADITIONAL_Q.
If 'E-COMMERCE' is selected. Go to ECOMM_Q.
If 'RX DTC' is selected. Go to RX_DTC_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If 'EXISTING' is selected then "Product Type" (1009) is <'Club Repack/RCP'>. Go to NEW_CLUB_Q.
If 'NEW' is selected then "Product Type" (1009) is <'Club'>. Go to NEW_CLUB_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If 'full' or ‘unit load’ is selected then "product subtype" (1010) is <'Traditional 1PKG=1CS'>. Go to END_COUNTRY_Q.
If ‘case’ is selected then "product subtype" (1010) is <'Non-Traditional'>. Go to END_COUNTRY_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If ‘straight case’ is selected then Go to STRAIGHT_Q.
If ‘bulk case’ is selected then Go to BULK_Q.
If ‘single serve’ or 'SS' is selected then Go to SINGLE_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If 'EXISTING' is selected then "Product Type" (1009) is <'Straight Case Repack/RCP'>. Go to STR_SUBTYPE_Q.
If 'NEW' is selected then "Product Type" (1009) is <'Straight Case'>. Go to STR_SUBTYPE_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If 'YES' is selected "product subtype" (1010) is <'Package and pouch/inner item with UPCs'>. Go to END_COUNTRY_Q.
If 'NO' is selected then "product subtype" (1010) is <'Package with UPC'>. Go to END_COUNTRY_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If 'YES' is selected then Go to BULK_PRINT_Q.
If 'NO' is selected then "Product Type" (1009) is <'Bulk Case'> and "product subtype" (1010) is <'No Package UPC'>. Go to END_COUNTRY_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If 'NEW' is selected then "Product Type" (1009) is <'Bulk Case'> and "product subtype"  (1010) is <'Package with UPC'>. Go to END_COUNTRY_Q.
If 'EXISTING' is selected then "Product Type" (1009) is <'Bulk Repack/RCP'> and "product subtype" (1010) is <'Package with UPC'>. Go to END_COUNTRY_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If 'NEW' is selected then "Product Type" (1009) is <'Single Serve'> and "product subtype" (1010) is <'With Tray'>. Go to END_COUNTRY_Q.
If 'EXISTING' is selected then "Product Type" (1009) is <'Single Serve Repack/RCP'> and "product subtype" (1010) is <'With Tray'>. Go to END_COUNTRY_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If ‘Brown’ or ‘Corrugate’ is selected then "product type" (1009) is <'ECOMM'> and "product subtype" (1010) is <'CASE (Brown Box)'>.  Go to END_COUNTRY_Q.
If ‘Printed’ is selected then "product type" (1009) is <'ECOMM'> and "product subtype" (1010) is <'CASE (Printed Box)'>. Go to END_COUNTRY_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If ‘RX DTC’ is selected then "Product Type" (1009) is <‘DTC Bundle’> and "product subtype" (1010) is <'Static (Pre-Determined Mix of Products)'>. Go to END_COUNTRY_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If 'Case' is selected then "Product Type" (1009) is <'WIP Case'> and "product subtype" (1010) is <'<NOT REQUIRED>'>. Go to END_COUNTRY_Q.
If 'Tote' or 'Kone' is selected then "Product Type" (1009) is <'WIP Tote'> and "product subtype" (1010) is <'<NOT REQUIRED>'>. Go to END_COUNTRY_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If 'Club' is selected then "Product Type" (1009) is <'Canada Club'>. Go to CA_CLUB_Q.
If 'traditional retailer' is selected then Go to CA_TRADITIONAL_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If ‘yes’ is selected then "product subtype" (1010) is <'Unit Load'>. Go to END_COUNTRY_Q.
If ‘no’ is selected then "product subtype" (1010) is <'Traditional 1PKG=1CS'>. Go to END_COUNTRY_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If 'straight case' is selected then Go to CA_STRAIGHT_Q.
If 'bulk case' is selected then "Product Type" (1009) is <'Canada Bulk Case'> and "product subtype" (1010) is <'<NOT REQUIRED>'>. Go to END_COUNTRY_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If 'NEW' then "Product Type" is <'Canada Straight Case'>. Go to CA_STR_SUBTYPE_Q.
If 'EXISTING' is selected then "Product Type" (1009) is <'Canada Straight Case Repack/RCP – existing PKG UPC'>. Go to CA_STR_SUBTYPE_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If ‘yes’ is selected then "product subtype" (1010) is <'Package and pouch/inner item with UPCs'>. Go to END_COUNTRY_Q.
If ‘no’ is selected then "product subtype" (1010) is <'Package with UPC'>. Go to END_COUNTRY_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Remind the user that this is a good time to save their progress by clicking the Save Progress button. Go to PRINGLES_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If 'YES', enter <'Yes'>. Go to RX_Q.
If 'NO', enter <'No'>. Go to RX_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If 'YES', enter <'Yes'>. Go to PROJECT_TYPE_Q.
If 'NO', enter <'No'>. Go to PROJECT_TYPE_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If 'PWR' is selected then "project type" (1014) is <'PWR'>. Go to PWR_Q.
If 'PDR' is selected then "project type" (1014) is <'PDR'>. Go to PROJECT_NAME_Q.
If 'SCR' is selected then "project type" (1014) is <'SCR'>. Go to PROJECT_NAME_Q.
If 'KUBIC' is selected then "project type" (1014) is <'KUBIC'>. Go to PROJECT_NAME_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Project Name or Number" (1015) field (must be numeric, can include a dash) <FREEFORM>. Go to END_PROJ_TYPE_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Project Name or Number" (1015) field (must be alphanumeric and numeric and can include a dash) <FREEFORM>. Go to END_PROJ_TYPE_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Go to SET_CATEGORY_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Set Category" (1016). Go to BRIEF_PROD_DESC_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Brief Product Description" (1017) of no more than 40 characters <FREEFORM>. Go to BRIEF_PROJ_OVRVW_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Brief Project Overview and Technical Notes" (1018) <FREEFORM>. Go to ST_WGT_APP_FOR_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Stated Weight Applicable For" (1019), either <'PACKAGE'> or <'INNER ITEM/POUCH'>. Go to ST_WGT_STATUS_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Stated Weight Status" (1020), either <'ESTIMATED'> or <'FINALIZED'>. Go to ST_NET_WGT_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Stated Net Weight" (1021) (must be numeric) <FREEFORM>. Go to ST_NET_WGT_UOM_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Stated Net Weight UOM" (1022), either <'OZ'>, <'LB'>, <'G'>, or <'KG'>. Go to CASE_CT_STATUS_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Case Count Status" (1023), either <'ESTIMATED'> or <'FINALIZED'>. Go to CASE_CT_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Case Count" (1024) (must be numeric) <FREEFORM>. Go to LIKE_SKU_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Go to DECISION_ECOMM_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'ECOMM' then "Approved to sell via Ecommerce" (1026) is <'YES'> and "Trade Channel" (1166) is <'ONLINE'>. Go to ONE_CUSTOMER_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'DTC Bundle' then "Approved to sell via Ecommerce" (1026) is <'YES'> and "Trade Channel" (1166) is <'ONLINE'>. Go to ONE_CUSTOMER_Q.
If "Product Country" (1008) is 'CA - CANADA' then Go to ONE_CUSTOMER_Q.
If "Form Type" (1007) is 'CASE' or 'DISPLAY' then Go to SELL_ECOMM_Q.
If "Form Type" (1007) is 'WIP' then Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Go to ONE_CUSTOMER_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If 'YES' is selected then Go to ONE_CUST_NAME_Q.
If 'NO' is selected and "Form Type" (1007) is 'CASE' then Go to DECISION_VAR_PACK_Q.
If 'NO' is selected and "Form Type" (1007) is 'DISPLAY' then Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Designated Customer Name" (1028). Go to INCL_ONE_CUST_MATL_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If "Form Type" (1007) is 'DISPLAY' then Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q.
If "Form Type" (1007) is 'CASE' then Go to DECISION_VAR_PACK_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Bulk Case' then "Variety Pack" (1030) is <'NO'> and "Variety Pack components have UPC Codes" (1031) is <'NO'>. Go to BUILD_SKU_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Bulk Case Repack/RCP' then Go to VARIETY_PACK_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Club' and "Product Subtype" (1010) is 'Non-traditional' then Go to VARIETY_PACK_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Club' and "Product Subtype" (1010) is 'Traditional' then "Variety Pack" (1030) is <'NO'> and "Variety Pack components have UPC Codes" (1031) is <'NO'>. Go to BUILD_SKU_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Club Repack/RCP' then "Variety Pack" (1030) is <'NO'> and "Variety Pack components have UPC Codes" (1031) is <'NO'>. Go to BUILD_SKU_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'DTC Bundle' then Go to DTC_VAR_PACK_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'ECOMM' then Go to VARIETY_PACK_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Single Serve' then Go to VARIETY_PACK_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Single Serve Repack/RCP' then Go to VARIETY_PACK_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Straight Case' and "Product Subtype" (1010) is 'Pkg with UPC' then Go to VARIETY_PACK_Q.

If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Straight Case' and "Product Subtype" (1010) is 'Pkg and Pouch' then "Variety Pack" (1030) is <'NO'> and "Variety Pack components have UPC Codes" (1031) is <'NO'>. Go to BUILD_SKU_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Straight Case Repack/RCP' then Go to VARIETY_PACK_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Variety Pack" (1030) is <'NO'>, as a default. Go to VARIETY_PACK_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If 'YES' is selected then "Variety Pack" is <'YES'>. Go to VP_COMP_UPC_Q.
If 'NO' is selected then "Variety Pack" is <'NO'>. Go to BUILD_SKU_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Variety Pack components have UPC Codes" (1031), either <'Yes'> or <'No'>. Go to BUILD_SKU_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Bulk Case' then "Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is <'NO'>. Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Bulk Case Repack/RCP' then "Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is <'YES'>. Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Club' then "Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is <'NO'>. Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Club Repack/RCP' then "Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is <'YES'>. Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'DTC Bundle' then then "Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is <'NO'>. Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'ECOMM' then "Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is <'NO'>. Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Single Serve' then "Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is <'NO'>. Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Single Serve Repack/RCP' then "Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is <'YES'>. Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Straight Case' then "Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is <'NO'>. Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Straight Case Repack/RCP' then "Build SKU Using Existing Package UPCs" (1032) is <'YES'>. Go to AWAY_FROM_HOME_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Is this item owned by Away From Home" (1033), either <'Yes'> or <'No'>. Go to EXPORT_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If "Form Type" (1007) is 'DISPLAY' then Go to DATASYNC_Q.
If 'YES' then Go to BUILD_SKU_EXPORT_Q.
If 'NO' then Go to PRIV_LABEL_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If 'YES' then Go to LIST_EXPORT_UPC_Q.
If 'NO' then Go to PRIV_LABEL_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "List Existing Export UPC Codes" (1036) <FREEFORM>. Go to PRIV_LABEL_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If 'YES' then Go to PRIV_LABEL_NAME_Q.
If 'NO' then "Data Sync(GDSN)" (1041) is <'YES'>. Go to DATASYNC_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Private Label Name" (1038). Go to BUILD_SKU_PRIV_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If 'YES' then Go to LIST_PRIV_UPC_Q.
If 'NO' then "Data Sync(GDSN)" (1041) is <'YES'>. Go to DATASYNC_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "List Existing Private UPCs" (1040) <FREEFORM>. Set "Data Sync(GDSN)" (1041) is <'YES'>. Go to DATASYNC_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Default "Data Sync(GDSN)" (1041) to <'YES'>. Go to FERT_WIP_FALB_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Is this Non Sellable FERT WIP" (1304), either <'Yes'> or <'No'>. Go to MATL_PREFIX_DESC_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Material Prefix Description" (1042). Go to COMPRESS_UPC_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If 'NO' then "SAP Classification field PACKAGE BAR CODE TYPE" is <'UPC_A'> and "SAP Classification field POUCH BAR CODE TYPE" is <'UPC_A'>. Go to DECISION_EXIST_PRTD_Q.
If 'POUCH' then "SAP Classification field PACKAGE BAR CODE TYPE" is <'UPC_A'> and "SAP Classification field POUCH BAR CODE TYPE" is <'UPC_E'>. Go to DECISION_EXIST_PRTD_Q.
If 'PACKAGE' then "SAP Classification field PACKAGE BAR CODE TYPE" is <'UPC_E'> and "SAP Classification field POUCH BAR CODE TYPE" is <'UPC_A'>. Go to DECISION_EXIST_PRTD_Q.
If 'BOTH' then "SAP Classification field PACKAGE BAR CODE TYPE" is <'UPC_E'> and "SAP Classification field POUCH BAR CODE TYPE" is <'UPC_E'>. Go to DECISION_EXIST_PRTD_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Bulk Case' then Go to UNIQUE_UPC_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Bulk Case Repack/RCP' then Go to PACKAGE_UPC_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Club' then Go to UNIQUE_UPC_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Club Repack/RCP' then Go to PACKAGE_UPC_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'DTC Bundle' then Go to UNIQUE_UPC_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'ECOMM' then Go to UNIQUE_UPC_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Single Serve' then Go to POUCH_UPC_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Single Serve Repack/RCP' then Go to PACKAGE_UPC_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Straight Case' and Product Subtype (1010) is 'Pkg and Pouch' then Go to POUCH_UPC_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Straight Case Repack/RCP' then Go to PACKAGE_UPC_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Package UPC Code" (1044) <FREEFORM> then Go to PACKAGE_K_NUM_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Package K Number" (1045) <FREEFORM> then Go to LIST_UPC_CODES_Q.
Capture "Package K Number" (1045) <FREEFORM> then Go to POUCH_UPC_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Pouch UPC Code" (1046) <FREEFORM> then Go to POUCH_K_NUM_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Pouch K Number" (1047) <FREEFORM> then Go to DECISION_UPC_CODES_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Single Serve' then Go to UNIQUE_UPC_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Straight Case' and "Product Subtype" (1010) is 'Pkg and Pouch' and "Product Country" is 'US - United States' then Go to SALES_SAMPLE_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Straight Case' and "Product Subtype" (1010) is 'Pkg and Pouch' and "Product Country" is NOT 'US - United States' then Go to UNIQUE_UPC_Q.
If "Product Type" (1009) is 'Straight Case Repack/RCP' and "Product Subtype" (1010) is 'Pkg and Pouch' then Go to LIST_UPC_CODES_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "List UPC Codes If Already Assigned" (1048) <FREEFORM>. Set "Compressed UPC Existing" to <'NO'>. Go to COMP_UPC_EXIST_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Compressed UPC Existing" (1049), either <'NO'>, <'POUCH'>, <'PACKAGE'>, or <'BOTH'>. Go to UNIQUE_UPC_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Sale Samples may be needed" (1050), either <'Yes'> or <'No'>. Go to UNIQUE_UPC_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Go to LIST_EXIST_K_NUM_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "List any existing Knumbers that will be used" (1052) <FREEFORM>. Go to ADDTNL_PKG_LAUNCH_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Capture "Additional Packaging for Launch" (1053). Multiple selections possible. Go to END_REQ_INITIATE_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
Go to END_REQ_INITIATE_Q.
Implicit next row fallback
